infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Proslync uses Face ID to verify your identity during athlete registration.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Status uses your location to show nearby events and share your live location with friends
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Status uses your location to keep your location on the map updated, even when the app is closed
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Status needs camera access for video calls and scanning IDs
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Status needs microphone access for voice and video calls
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Status uses Bluetooth to connect to card readers for in-person payments
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Status uses Bluetooth to connect to card readers for in-person payments
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Status uses the local network to discover and connect to card readers

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Status uses your location to keep your location on the map updated, even when the app is closed
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Status uses your location to show nearby events and share your live location with friends

plugins.cameraPermissionText: Status needs camera access to scan IDs and membership cards

plugins.cameraPermission: Status needs camera access for video calls and scanning IDs
